description_long: This induction cooker is integrated into a compact kitchen unit featuring a gray countertop with a round stainless steel sink and faucet on one end. The cooktop itself has four distinct induction heating zones, each outlined on a smooth black glass surface. Below the cooktop, there is a built-in oven with a transparent door and control knobs, as well as several drawers and cabinet doors for storage. The rear side of the unit reveals open shelving, providing additional storage space. The exterior is primarily white with metallic accents, and the overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban apartments or compact living spaces.
description: A modern induction cooker integrated into a compact kitchen unit with a black glass cooktop, built-in oven, sink, and storage compartments. The exterior is white with metallic and gray accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the induction cooktop, oven, control knobs, sink, and cabinet doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit and the position of the sink and cooktop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying open shelving and the back of the sink and cooktop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sink and the side profile of the countertop.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front above the oven, featuring a row of rotary knobs and possibly a few push buttons. There are no visible touch areas or digital displays, and the controls are labeled with simple icons or text.
